history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up portrait shows a person with dark, styled hair indoors, looking at the camera while touching their lips with one finger.

The main subject is a person facing the camera at a slight angle, with dark brown eyes, a straight fringe, and hair pulled back into a voluminous updo. They have a neutral, slightly posed expression and are holding a finger near their mouth, as if gently touching or resting it against their lower lip. They are wearing a light-colored sleeveless top and a thin necklace with a heart-shaped pendant. A small butterfly-shaped earring is visible on one ear. Their fingernails are painted a light pink tone, and there is a ring with a small decorative design on one finger.

The setting appears to be an indoor living or lounge area with soft, warm lighting. Behind the person, there are glass doors and a doorframe, a countertop or sideboard with a dark front panel, and a vase with white flowers on top. A framed picture hangs on the wall in the background, and other seating is partially visible on the right side.

No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary: The image is a close-up selfie-style photo of a person indoors. They wear jewelry and a sleeveless top, with one finger held near their lips while looking toward the camera.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

[No readable text found in the screenshot.]

# Structured Version

- No text visible (image appears to be a photo with no on-screen UI, captions, or labels).

# Notes

- If there is text embedded in the photo (e.g., on objects/signs), it is not legible/visible in this screenshot.

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, high-angle, soft-focus portrait of a young East Asian woman with her dark hair styled in a messy bun on top of her head, with wisps framing her face. She is wearing a white ribbed tank top and delicate silver jewelry: a necklace with a hollow heart pendant, a ring on her right index finger shaped like a flower with a small diamond in the center, a flower-shaped stud earring on her right ear, and a bracelet on her left wrist with several small charms. Her makeup is soft and dewy, with a focus on glowing skin, rosy cheeks, and glossy pink lips. Her eyes are large and expressive, with defined eyeliner and long lashes. Her right hand is brought up to her mouth, with her index finger gently touching her lips. The background is softly blurred, showing a modern interior with hints of dark cabinetry, a mirror with flowers, and a framed picture on the wall. The lighting is soft and diffused, creating a warm and intimate atmosphere. The overall mood is romantic, feminine, and serene. The color palette is dominated by soft pastels, warm skin tones, and the cool tones of the silver jewelry and white tank top.
